nodes.label: EBM7 acceptance: manifold-aware Langevin integrators.  Sprint: EBM7 (the GA + EB
E(B) = 0.5 * Σ B_i² over grade-2 coefficients only.
The acceptance criterion: starting from a random grade-2 bivector,     1000 step
Zero-temperature bivector Langevin on E(B) = ||B||²/2 should drive     the state
Passing grad_fn explicitly should match the numerical-grad result     to high pr
E(x) = -κ μ·x — the energy whose Boltzmann distribution is vMF(μ, κ).
Analytic gradient of E(x) = -κ μ·x: ∇E = -κ μ (constant).
Every sampled point must lie on S² to numerical precision.
Target: vMF(μ = e3, κ = 5) on S². 10k samples; assert MLE within     10% of 5.0.
At T=0, gradient descent on E(x) = -μ·x climbs to the mode μ.     Equivalent: do
User can pass any non-zero vector; it gets normalized to S^{d-1}.
When all samples are exactly at μ, r̄ → 1 and κ → ∞.
Uniform-on-sphere data gives r̄ ≈ 0, hence κ ≈ 0.
